question: Analyzing the area chart of the performance index from 2018 to 2022, which statement is best supported by the data shown?

options.A: The chart does not provide enough information to determine whether the index values in 2021 and 2022 are equal or different.
options.B: The performance index is exactly the same in 2021 and 2022.
options.C: The performance index was highest in 2018.
options.D: The performance index decreased every year from 2018 to 2022.

explanation: The y-axis maximum is below the data maximum, so the top bars are truncated and appear equal.
